description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On Wednesday, July 30, a Nuro vehicle operating in autonomous mode came to a complete stop at a sign-controlled intersection, then 
began to cautiously proceed through the intersection to make a left turn, with the turn signal indicators activated.  Just after the Nuro vehicle 
began to move into the intersection, it was struck from behind by another vehicle.
Print
Clear Form
